draft.title: TypeError in runtime.js:412 — Cannot read properties of undefined
draft.description:
## What failed

Test suite threw `TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'map')` at `src/runtime.js:412`.

## Suggested next steps

- Check the value passed to `.map()` at line 412
- Add a null guard or validate input shape upstream
